items.name_cn:
Mini!!️
Journey Series Mini Dark Grey Denim
A hobo bag with a relaxed and soft silhouette
Brand new grey denim fabric, premium and durable
Features a gold letter shoulder strap buckle, retro and chic
Exquisite letter leather tag, details are spot on
Multiple carrying styles: handbag, shoulder, and crossbody
Key features: ultra-lightweight and spacious
Fashionistas know the value of this bag
size:25.5*14.5*14cm p00315300980

items.name_cn:
Large in stock!!️
Toujours series latest autumn/winter grained leather, absolutely stunning, high-visibility large bag, very fresh color, eye-catching, effortlessly exudes a premium feel. Oversized quilted grained leather design paired with classic letter accessories, very modern and stylish. The bag structure is soft, calfskin material feels luxurious, unique clasp design allows the sides to fold when closed. Capacity is very nice, thoughtfully includes an inner pocket for small items.
size:37*27*21cm

items.name_cn:
D-Journey Medium
✨Unisex super relaxed hobo!
Two materials [Monogram Crinkled Black Calfskin]
Handheld / Crossbody
Stylish and cool, an aura that needs no definition
Cool to the bone
Purchased for about 30,000, heavy and substantial in every way
Long production cycle
Over a dozen handmade details front and back
Custom fabric and hardware
Details and texture are perfect
Casual hobo with practicality
Size 33*16*15

items.name_cn:
Mini White!!️
Original leather lining with sheepskin D-Joy bag
Fashion is indeed a cycle, returning to a vintage Diana-style rectangular bag
Short chain + thin long shoulder strap is absolutely god-tier!! Strong retro chic, suitable for any occasion 😉 Definitely the ceiling of ladies' bags, making a strong impression sisters 👱‍♀️
Size;16*5.5*10cm

items.name_cn:
In stock!!️
Original leather lining with sheepskin and wool felt. D-Joy bag, sheepskin, 2023 model. Fashion is truly cyclical; this is a return to the vintage Diana bag. The rectangular shape with a short chain and a slim shoulder strap is absolutely god-tier!! Strong retro and trendy feel, suitable for any occasion😉. It is definitely the pinnacle of 'lady' style. Strongly standing out, sisters👱‍♀️
Size: 16*5.5*10cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: Latest brick store butterfly bow chain WOC
items.name_cn:
Latest brick store butterfly bow chain WOC
Iconic rattan pattern, classic letter charm
Distinctive bow design paired with soft sheepskin
Elegant and stylish, the highlight is the exquisite bow chain
Making the whole bag more refined, with multiple interior pockets and card slots. Beautiful yet highly practical
size: 21*11.5*7cm
5840
